puzzle.hint: This verse offers encouragement to believers, reminding them of their elevated status and urging them not to despair in the face of challenges.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَا تَهِنُوا۟ وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَوْنَ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: So do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are [true] believers.
